div.h1: SIMD memcpy: Data Flow Through Memory Hierarchy
div.p: 16-byte chunks flowing through registers with cache line boundaries
|<- 64B Cache Line (8 x 64-bit qwords) ->| [ 16B Aligned ][ 16B Aligned ][ 16B Aligned ][ 16B Aligned ]
Implementation Insight: Aligned SIMD instructions (MOVAPS, MOVDQA) generate a General Protection fault (#GP) if the address is not a multiple of 16. Prologue phase is mandatory for correctness.
